nasb.text: There is one who speaks rashly like the thrusts of a sword, But the tongue of the wise brings healing.

esv.text: There is one whose rash words are like sword thrusts, but the tongue of the wise brings healing.

cnv.text: 有人說話不慎，好像利刀刺人， 智慧人的舌頭卻能醫治人。

ccb.text: 出言不慎犹如利剑伤人， 智者之言却能医治创伤。

csbs.text: 有人轻率说话，如刀刺人； 智慧人的话语，使人痊愈。
